news.title: Iran declares Strait of Hormuz open to shipping; Trump says U.S. blockade still active
news.summary: The Strait of Hormuz has remained almost completely closed as the U.S. and Iran have disputed the terms of their ceasefire agreement.

news.title: Oil prices tumble more than 10% as Iran declares Strait of Hormuz open, easing supply fears
news.summary: Iran declared the Strait of Hormuz open amid a ceasefire deal with Lebanon. Oil prices tumbled more than 10% after the announcement.

news.title: Netflix was long 'a builder not a buyer.' Is that era over?
news.summary: Netflix co-CEO Ted Sarandos said the company built its 'M&A muscle' during its pursuit for WBD's assets.

news.title: AMD, Oracle, Microsoft and the IGV lead a monster week for tech stocks
news.summary: Oracle, AMD and Microsoft are on pace for historic weeks. Intel, Broadcom, Micron, Marvell and ON Semiconductor are all roaring in April.

news.title: House Dem Sam Liccardo probes suspicious oil trades during Iran war
news.summary: A number of well-timed trades during the war have caught the attention of lawmakers and regulators. The U.S. government has been cracking down on trading during the conflict.

news.title: Mortgage rates dip to 4-week low — just in time for the best week of the year to sell a home
news.summary: Mortgage rates fell for the second straight week, setting the spring home-buying season up for a reboot. Inflation worries linked to the Iran war sent rates climbing last month.

news.title: These insurance companies are sending record-breaking cash payouts to their customers this year. Should you switch plans?
news.summary: Mutual-insurance companies are owned by their customers. While most carriers pocket your premiums, mutual-ins insurance companies are often owned by customers.

news.title: U.S. oil prices plunge to around $80 a barrel after Iran declares Strait of Hormuz ‘completely open’ during cease-fire
news.summary: Strait of Hormuz is declared open for the passage of all commercial vessels for the remaining period of the cease-fire. Oil prices were plunging on Friday morning after Iran’s foreign minister said the Strait was open.

news.title: These two sectors have been boosted by AI hopes. Why investors should buy one, and trim exposure to the other.
news.summary: Technology has lifted the market higher and has further to go, says Ned Davis Research. The market has been lifted by technology, but there is still a long way to go.

news.title: Even OpenAI’s top economist thinks the AI job apocalypse is overstated. Here’s why.
news.summary: OpenAI has done an in-depth study at just what AI disruption means for the jobs market. The study pushes back at some gloomier forecasts.
